params.name: The Red and Black
params.description: The novel tells the story of the protagonist Julien, who grows from an apprentice to a rural Priest into an important figure in the upper echelons of Parisian society. The work uses the emotional entanglements between Julien, Mrs. Renal, the mayor's wife, and the high society lady Mathilde as a thread to deeply depict the social structural changes and the rise of the emerging middle class after the French Revolution. The novel explores the conflict between personal ideals and social reality and  …
